hero.title: Residencial Santana
hero.subtitle: Suites, Lofts, and Apartments designed for your comfort in the best location of the city.

accommodations.title: Our Accommodations
accommodations.subtitle: Options carefully designed with sophistication to meet different needs, all with the exclusivity and comfort you deserve.

suite.title: Suite
suite.desc: Versatile and cozy accommodation, ideal for those seeking practicality without giving up comfort.

loft.title: Loft
loft.desc: Modern and integrated space with a private kitchen, combining hotel comfort with the freedom of home.

apartment.title: Apartment
apartment.desc: The largest unit in the residence, with separate environments and full structure for the whole family.
apartment.bed: Private bedroom + Sofa bed in living room

amenities.title: Feel at home
amenities.subtitle: We've thought of every detail to provide maximum comfort during your stay in this Bahian paradise.

ac.title: Air Conditioning
ac.desc: Perfect climate control in all units

kitchen.title: Equipped Kitchen
kitchen.desc: Fully equipped to prepare your own meals

leisure.title: Leisure Area
leisure.desc: Space with outdoor shower, barbecue, tables and cold drinks

perfect_location.title: Perfect Location
perfect_location.desc: Close to the best beaches and clubs in Itacaré

location.label: Our Location
location.title: The heart of Itacaré
location.desc: Residencial Santana is strategically located so you can enjoy the best the city has to offer. We are just steps away from the famous Pituba Street, Itacaré's gastronomic and nightlife center.
location.card_desc: Feel the sea breeze without giving up urban comfort.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore our spaces in detail. A glimpse of the comfort and style awaiting you on your next vacation.

faq.title: Contact Us
faq.subtitle: Talk to us on WhatsApp and we'll answer everything you need.

questions.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
questions.a: Check-in is from 2:00 PM and check-out is until 12:00 PM. Flexible hours can be arranged depending on availability.
Please check availability and conditions for hosting with pets via WhatsApp.
Free cancellation up to 7 days before the check-in date. Check specific conditions at the time of booking.

questions.q: Is the residence close to the center (Pituba Street)?
questions.a: Yes, we are strategically located so you can enjoy the nightlife and restaurants on Pituba Street without needing a car.

footer.about: Your home in Itacaré. Comfort, privileged location, and unforgettable moments in the heart of Bahia.

booking.title: Secure Your Stay
booking.subtitle: Choose your travel dates and book your preferred accommodation directly with us.
